subcodes.first_line: O Lord, assist Thy loved ones to guard Thy mighty stronghold and to turn towards Thy resplendent light, and make them steadfast upon Thy path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب اید احبتک بحراسه حصنک الحصین و التوجه الی نورک المبین و ثبتهم علی صراطک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for protection
